decisionSummary: The existing screen-shader gated-review primitive was wired into the production apply-flow decision point for decoration.screen_shader only. Ungated screen-shader production-flow fixture writes are rejected before final apply; gated screen-shader fixture writes with a valid dry-run watchdog proof are accepted. Compile-aware validation remains deferred.

proofUsed.finding: apply_setting_change_with_backup_manager now routes through review_screen_shader_gated_write_plan with no proof, rejecting decoration.screen_shader before final apply. apply_setting_change_with_backup_manager_and_high_risk_gate accepts an explicit HighRiskGateProof for gated fixture/proof flow.
screen-shader-dry-run-gated-write-review validates setting id, recovery bucket, target path, and existing dry-run watchdog plan/backup artifacts.

Fixture tests prove ungated production-flow screen_shader rejection, gated fixture acceptance, mismatched proof rejection, unrelated row bypass, unchanged counts, unchanged allowlist, and deferred compile-aware validation.
Watchdog migration proof remains complete and fixture/temp-only.

proofStillMissing: compile-aware shader validation design remains deferred
standalone non-live shader compiler feasibility proof remains deferred
live shader compile and live display/render proof remain forbidden and were not used
nextRecommendedSprint: Screen shader compile-aware validation design research sprint: research whether non-live shader compile validation can be designed safely. Do not implement shader compilation, do not use live compositor/render proof, and do not change writable counts or allowlists.
